title: obra/superpowers
summary: obra/superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，旨在通过子代理驱动开发（subagent-driven development）来提升开发效率。该项目提供了结构化的工作流和技能集，支持 AI 辅助的头脑风暴、编码等任务，强调在软件开发生命周期（SDLC）中有效利用 AI 代理。其高星数表明社区关注度极高，具有潜在的技术价值。
summary_en: obra/superpowers is an agentic skills framework and software development methodology designed to enhance development efficiency through subagent-driven development. It provides structured workflows and skill sets for AI-assisted tasks like brainstorming and coding, emphasizing effective use of AI agents in the SDLC. Its high star count indicates significant community interest and potential technical value.
